description_long: This object is a large, rectangular, single-story structure resembling a military barracks or command post, with multiple rooms and open spaces visible through the exterior walls. The interior is filled with rows of beds or cots, tables, and various equipment, suggesting a utilitarian, tactical environment. The walls are adorned with posters and equipment racks, and there are several partitioned areas, possibly for privacy or operational purposes. The color palette is dominated by muted tones, with blue, gray, and beige surfaces, and the lighting appears to be artificial, typical of indoor facilities. There are no visible wheels, tracks, or external vehicle features such as turrets or mounted weapons. The structure appears to be designed for personnel accommodation or operational command rather than direct combat engagement.
description: A large, rectangular military-style building with multiple rooms, beds, and equipment, featuring muted blue and gray tones. The structure is utilitarian and appears to serve as a barracks or command post.
description_view_0: This view shows the main entrance area and a clear layout of the interior rooms, with rows of beds and tables visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the structure with more visible beds and a partitioned area, possibly for storage or privacy.
description_view_2: This perspective reveals the rear section, showing additional equipment and a more open central space.
description_view_3: This view provides a look at the opposite side, with more wall-mounted items and a clear view of the interior layout.
